chapter_title.en: Chapter on Those Who Have No Blood Money in Cases of Injury or

text: 5185 - وَ رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ سَالِمٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ بَدَأَ فَاعْتَدَى فَاعْتُدِيَ عَلَيْهِ فَلاَ قَوَدَ لَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5185 - Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Sulayman ibn Khalid, who said:
Abu Abdullah (as) said: "Whoever initiates aggression and is then retaliated against, there is no retribution (qisas) for him."
